fields.altText: England v Argentina: Semi Final - FIFA World Cup 2026ATLANTA, GEORGIA - JULY 15: Players of Argentina hold a banner after the FIFA World Cup 2026 Semi Final match between England and Argentina at Atlanta Stadium on July 15, 2026 in Atlanta, Georgia. The banner refers to the British Overseas Territory of the Falkland Islands, located off the coast of Argentina. Argentina disputes British sovereignty over the islands and refers to them as Las Malvinas. (Photo by MB Media/Getty Images)

properties.description: Coverage of football World Cups from all years.

properties.bio: Rob Smyth is a freelance sport writer
Will Magee is the Guardian's football writer and subeditor.
Niall McVeigh is an assistant production editor, writer and live blogger for Guardian sport
Bryan Armen Graham is the deputy sport editor of Guardian US. Twitter @bryanagraham. Click here for Bryan's public key
Martin Belam is a live blogger for the Guardian based in London, and writes the Thursday quiz
Pablo Iglesias Maurer is a soccer correspondent for The Guardian US
Nesrine Malik is a Guardian columnist and the author of We Need New Stories: Challenging the Toxic Myths Behind Our Age of Discontent
Esther Addley is senior news writer at the Guardian
Rob Draper is a football and athletics reporter with a specialism in anti-doping. He was European Football Writer of the Year in 2023
Matt Hughes is the global sports business correspondent at the Guardian
Ed Aarons is a football writer for the Guardian
Nick Ames is the Guardian's European sport correspondent
David Hytner is chief football correspondent for the Guardian
Jonathan Wilson writes about football for the Guardian, including the weekly Inside football column

Marcela specialises in South American and Argentinian football. Recent adventures include translating Diego Maradona's autobiography, El Diego, into English, and providing the expertise for the BBC World Cup Stories - Argentina programme, which won the RTS Sport Documentary of the year award for 2006
Jacob Steinberg is a football reporter for the Guardian
Taha Hashim is a Guardian sports writer
Andrew Beasley is a data visual journalist specialising in sport
Barney Ronay is chief sports writer for the Guardian

properties.byline: Rob Smyth , Niall McVeigh and Will Magee

properties.description: On our daily blog we provide live news coverage of the latest events in global financial markets, the economy and major corporate moves, with instant reaction and analysis from our own team of reporters and experts around the world

properties.bio: Julia Kollewe writes about pharmaceuticals, property and insurance for the Guardian and the Observer, and often covers breaking City news as well. She previously worked at the Independent, Bloomberg News and Market News International
Lisa O’Carroll is a Guardian senior staff correspondent who writes about international trade, post-Brexit EU affairs and Anglo-Irish affairs
Kalyeena Makortoff is the Guardian's banking correspondent

properties.bio: Sian Lewis is a freelance outdoors and travel journalist and author who loves putting adventure kit through its paces while out hiking, swimming and wild camping
